Shipping Info

Estimated USA delivery in 3-5 business days. Free shipping over $120.

Delivery Estimate

Order today and receive your Zavora piece within 3-5 business days after dispatch.

Returns

Easy 14-day returns on unworn items with original tags.

Product Description

The Noir Oversized Hoodie is a luxury streetwear essential with a relaxed silhouette, premium hand-feel, and minimal Zavora finish.

Fit Information

Oversized fit. Choose true size for relaxed streetwear volume, or size down for a cleaner shape.

Fabric Details

Heavy cotton fleece with smooth exterior, soft brushed interior, and structured drape.

Care Instructions

Cold wash inside out, low dry, do not bleach, and avoid high heat to protect color depth.

Use the size chart below for chest, shoulder, and length measurements before ordering.
